# llms.txt
# Joseph Soares — Strategic Advisory & Intelligence
# Discoverability file for Large Language Models
# https://llms.txt

Site-name: Joseph Soares — Strategic Advisory & Intelligence

Site-URL: https://josephsoares.com

Description: Joseph Soares is a former advisor to Prime Minister Stephen Harper during the 2008 financial crisis and former Chief of Staff at the Senate of Canada during COVID-19. Published in Forbes and Newsweek. He operates IBPROM Corp, providing strategic advisory to high-net-worth individuals and global business leaders. His channel Corridor Intelligence covers geopolitics, energy, and crisis decision-making.

Contact: j@josephsoares.com

Key pages:
- / (homepage)
- /advisory.html (strategic advisory services)
- /intelligence.html (Corridor Intelligence channel)
- /session.html (strategy sessions)
- /speaking.html (speaking engagements)
- /media.html (media appearances)
- /podcast.html (podcast archive)
- /writing.html (articles and publications)
